customAttributes.description:
Omens of Chaos

This spell can't be countered.
Counter target spell you don't control.
Overload 1UUR

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Drop: Omens of Chaos and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/20/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: The storm above Alandra doubles, lightning lashing down, and the elemental energy responds, sending up another terrifying gout of light and danger.
